notes: The maze is severely broken — rows 18-30 are all walls making the bottom half unplayable, pacman movement logic has a bug (only moves when nextDir is valid, skipping current dir move), ghosts move every frame making them impossibly fast, dotsRemaining is hardcoded to 240 but the actual dot count doesn't match the sparse maze, and the mouth angle calculation doesn't properly account for direction rotation.

The game runs at an unplayable 60 tiles per second, ghosts get stuck vibrating against walls, eaten ghosts don't die, the win condition is mathematically impossible, and the score is rendered outside the canvas bounds.

Basic movement and state handling exist, but major Pac-Man essentials are missing or broken: the grid does not reset on restart, dot count is inconsistent with the maze, ghosts marked eaten never recover properly, the lower maze rows are solid walls, and score/lives text is rendered off-canvas.
